title: Helmaroc King from Zelda: The Wind Waker
description: This resource pack replaces the Ender Dragon by Helmaroc King from Zelda: The Wind Waker
body:
This resource pack replaces the Ender Dragon by Helmaroc King from Zelda: The Wind Waker.

Optifine (forge), or entity textures & models features is required (fabric)!


Custom sounds from Zelda: The Wind Waker are included
